summary: Action Required Fix + Card Enrichment - All tests passed. FIX 1: action_required bucket now contains ONLY participant invitations (status=invited), NOT organizer items with pending participants. The 32+ organizer items with pending are correctly in 'upcoming' bucket with action_required=false. FIX 2: Timeline cards now display enriched metadata grid (date, duration, location/type, guarantee) and engagement rules (tolerated_delay_minutes, cancellation_deadline_hours). Frontend dashboard correctly shows 1 action required (participant invitation from Igaal Hanouna) and 32 Remind buttons for organizer items with pending in À venir tab.

backend_pytest: ✅ Timeline has action_required, upcoming, past buckets
✅ action_required contains ONLY participant items with status=invited
✅ NO organizer items in action_required bucket (FIX VERIFIED)
✅ Organizer items with pending are in upcoming bucket with action_required=false
✅ Organizer items have pending_label 'En attente de réponse (N)'
✅ Organizer items with pending have 'remind' action
✅ action_required count is participant invitations only
✅ Participant items have all required fields
✅ Organizer items have all required fields including participant counts

✅ Participant invitation shows 'Votre réponse est attendue' label
✅ Timeline cards display metadata grid (date, duration, location, guarantee)
✅ Timeline cards display engagement rules (Tolérance retard, Annulation possible)

✅ Calendar sync panel with Google Calendar toggle

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Backend fix at line 986-989: action_required is now always False for organizer items
✅ Backend adds new fields: location_display_name, tolerated_delay_minutes, cancellation_deadline_hours
✅ Frontend TimelineCard displays metadata grid with date, duration, location/type, guarantee
✅ Frontend TimelineCard displays engagement rules when tolerated_delay_minutes > 0 or cancellation_deadline_hours > 0
✅ Frontend ActionCard displays same enriched information for action_required items
context_for_next_testing_agent: Action Required fix verified. The GET /api/appointments/my-timeline endpoint now correctly separates: (1) action_required bucket contains ONLY participant invitations with status=invited, (2) organizer items with pending participants are in 'upcoming' bucket with action_required=false and pending_label='En attente de réponse (N)'. New fields location_display_name, tolerated_delay_minutes, cancellation_deadline_hours are present on all timeline items. Frontend displays enriched cards with metadata grid and engagement rules.
